---
title: ""
---

## Publications

1. **Alam MS**, Thomas LF, Brumpton B, Hveem K, Lundin KE, Withoff S, Jonkers IH, Sollid LM, Hjort R, Ness-Jensen E. *Genome-wide association study identifies novel risk variants for celiac disease in the 5p15. 33 locus: insights from a population-based screening of adults, the HUNT study.* medRxiv. 2024 Dec 10:2024-12. [DOI: 10.1101/2024.12.09.24318711](https://doi.org/10.1101/2024.12.09.24318711)

2. Singh M, **Alam MS**, Majumdar P, Tiwary B, Narzari H, Mahendradhata Y. *Understanding the spatial predictors of malnutrition among 0–2 years children in India using path analysis.* Frontiers in Public Health. 2021 Jul 30;9:667502. [DOI: 10.3389/fpubh.2021.667502](https://doi.org/10.3389/fpubh.2021.667502)

3. Mustafa A, **Alam MS**, Shekhar C. *The effects of social media consumption among the internet users during COVID-19 lockdown in India: Results from an online survey.* Online Journal of Health and Allied Sciences. 2020 Mar 25;19(4). [URL](https://www.ojhas.org/issue76/2020-4-6.html)

4.	Sen K, Sinha A, Sen S, Chakraborty S, **Alam MS**. *Thyroid Function Test in COVID-19 Patients: A Cross-Sectional Study in a Tertiary Care Hospital.* Indian J Endocrinol Metab. 2020;24(6):532-536. [DOI:10.4103/ijem.IJEM_779_20](https://doi.org/10.4103/ijem.IJEM_779_20)
